QuartzRestApi
Table of Contents

Class SchedulerConnector

Namespace
QuartzRestApi
Assembly
QuartzRestApi.dll

Connects to the SchedulerHost

public class SchedulerConnector
Inheritance
object
SchedulerConnector
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Constructors

SchedulerConnector(string, string)

Create a new instance of the SchedulerConnector

public SchedulerConnector(string schedulerHostAddress, string apiKey = null)

Parameters

schedulerHostAddress string

The host address of the scheduler

apiKey string

Optional API key. When supplied it is sent as the X-Api-Key header on every request. Must match the key configured on the SchedulerHost. Pass null or an empty string when the host has no key configured.

Methods

AddCalendar(BaseCalendar)

Adds a calendar to the scheduler

public Task AddCalendar(BaseCalendar calendar)

Parameters

calendar BaseCalendar

Returns

Task

AddJob(JobDetail)

Adds a job with no associated trigger

Parameters

Returns

Task

CheckExists(JobKey)

Returns true if a job with the given key exists

Parameters

jobKey JobKey

Returns

Task<bool>

Returns true if a trigger with the given key exists

Parameters

triggerKey TriggerKey

Returns

Task<bool>

Clear()

Clears all scheduling data — all jobs, triggers and calendars

Returns

Task

Context()

Returns the SchedulerContext of the scheduler

Returns

Deletes the calendar with the given name. Returns true when deleted.

Returns

Task<bool>

Deletes the job with the given key and all associated triggers

jobKey JobKey

Returns
